offer: For Shopify store owners processing 10–50 orders/month, high customer churn causes lost revenue. We provide a customer churn analysis and retention system instead of manual tracking of customer interactions and sales data.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Shopify store owners
Indie Hackers posts about similar challenges
DM outreach to Shopify store owners with demo video
Community forums where Shopify store owners share tools
try_it: Let users try logging interactions and churn rate on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Allow CSV import for existing customer data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process to reduce steps
